message:
test(proptest): add 20 property tests for runtime_diagnostics_ux

Covers serde roundtrips for RemediationStep, DiagnosticTemplate,
TemplateCheck, CertificationReport, RenderedDiagnostic; rendering
contracts (human text contains error code, robot JSON validity,
remediation count); catalog lookup invariants; certification summary;
and edge cases (empty catalog, no robot-safe steps).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
